name: jylhis-skills
description: Curated agent-skills marketplace by Jylhis. Default plugin (jylhis-skills-core) ships cross-cutting skills; per-language and per-tool plugins are opt-in.

plugins.name: jylhis-skills-core
plugins.description: Default Jylhis bundle: cross-cutting security review, ast-grep structural search, offline documentation lookup. Ships @reviewer / @explorer / @debugger subagents and the /explore + /lsp-status commands.

plugins.name: jylhis-python
plugins.description: Python 3.12+ — modern style, asyncio, type hints, Ruff, uv, pytest.

plugins.name: jylhis-typescript
plugins.description: TypeScript 5.9+ on Node 22 LTS — type system depth, async, ESLint 9 flat config, pnpm workspaces, Vitest.

plugins.name: jylhis-go
plugins.description: Modern Go — slices/maps/cmp packages, sync.OnceFunc, context.AfterFunc, atomic generics, http.ServeMux methods, iter.Seq.

plugins.name: jylhis-jvm
plugins.description: JVM build/test — Gradle 8.10+ Kotlin DSL, version catalogs, Maven Central, JUnit 5, kotest, Testcontainers.

plugins.name: jylhis-emacs
plugins.description: Emacs + Emacs Lisp — modern Elisp, major-mode authoring, MELPA/ELPA publishing, ERT, debugging, gptel + MCP.

plugins.name: jylhis-nix
plugins.description: Nix / Nixpkgs / NixOS — flakes, packaging, modules, nix-darwin, home-manager, devenv, dockerTools, nixosTests.

plugins.name: jylhis-filesystems
plugins.description: Low-level filesystems — APFS, Btrfs, ZFS / OpenZFS.

plugins.name: jylhis-gitlab
plugins.description: GitLab CI/CD pipelines and the glab CLI for terminal-based GitLab workflows.
